introSection: Rocky Coaster (Japanese: ロッキーコースター) is a steel roller coaster currently located at Suzuka Circuit in Suzuka, Mie, Japan.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Brown track and supports. The ride used to feature white track and green supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a bunch of logs.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Rocky Coaster on the parks website (Japanese)

fullText:
Rocky Coaster (Japanese: ロッキーコースター) is a steel roller coaster currently located at Suzuka Circuit in Suzuka, Mie, Japan.



Brown track and supports. The ride used to feature white track and green supports.

The train is designed to resemble a bunch of logs.


 * Rocky Coaster on the parks website (Japanese)
